latest.title: Dragonfly eyes see the world backwards
latest.script_key: look at those compound eyes each little lens faces a different angle that s why they see in every direction at once but here s the kicker their brain flips the image so what they see is actually upside down that s how they dodge predators mid air they don t just see backwards they react to it too

latest.title: Penguins use rocks to stay cool too
latest.script_key: watch those feet penguins pant through the soles that s why they pick rocks over sand bare rock stays cooler than loose soil so they basically stand on mini ac units bet you didn t learn that in school feel that heat next time you re barefoot

latest.title: Bears save energy with the slowest trick ever
latest.script_key: that bear just won laziness because he s already saving energy before he curls up watch his breathing slow to one breath every 45 seconds that s why his heart rate drops from 50 beats to just 10 did you learn this wrong in school too

latest.title: Sharks sense tiny electric fields
